problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
